debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

failed_attempts:
induction p with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons h q ih => hammer
  | loop q ih => hammer

have edges_length : p.edges.length = p.length := by
    induction p with
    | nil => rfl  
    | cons _ _ ih => simp [edges, darts, length, ih]
    | loop _ ih => simp [edges, darts, length, ih]
  conv_rhs => rw [← edges_length]
  exact List.sum_toFinset_countP_eq_length p.edges

have edges_length : p.edges.length = p.length := by
    induction p with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons _ _ ih => simp only [edges, darts, length, List.length_map, List.length_cons, ih]
    | loop _ ih => simp only [edges, darts, length, List.length_map, List.length_cons, ih]
  rw [← edges_length]
  simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet]
  rw [← List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]

have edges_length : p.edges.length = p.length := by
    induction p with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons _ _ ih => simp only [edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.length_cons, length, ih]
    | loop _ ih => simp only [edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.length_cons, length, ih]
  rw [← edges_length]
  simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet]
  rw [← List.toFinset_sum_count_eq_length p.edges]

induction p with
  | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, edgeCount, length]
  | cons h q ih => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, edgeCount, length, *]
  | loop q ih => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, edgeCount, length, *]

induction p with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons h q ih => simp_all [edgeSet, edgeCount, edges, darts, length]
  | loop q ih => simp_all [edgeSet, edgeCount, edges, darts, length]
